name: Peter Gabriel
abstract: Peter Brian Gabriel (born 13 February 1950) is an English singer-songwriter, musician, and human rights activist. He is known primarily for both his solo career and his eight-year run as the lead vocalist of Genesis.

about_quotes.speaker: Mike Davis
about_quotes.evidence: I did a live show with Peter Gabriel, I think it was on David Letterman I believe when it was still The Letterman Show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mike Davis interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 1, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Pete Levin
about_quotes.evidence: Peter Gabriel was also a tremendous artist and a very creative thinker. I always respected him for going out on live tours...
about_quotes.doc_title: Pete Levin interviewed by Monk Rowe, Danbury, Connecticut, November 20, 2001
